message:
style(demo_showcase): Apply clippy lints and rustfmt across test suite

Comprehensive cleanup pass applying Rust idioms and formatting to the
demo_showcase test infrastructure:

Clippy fixes:
- Replace `assert!(x.len() > 0)` with `assert!(!x.is_empty())`
- Use inline format args: `format!("{:?}", x)` → `format!("{x:?}")`
- Remove redundant string format arguments
- Fix assertion message formatting

Code style:
- Consistent use of inline format strings throughout test helpers
- Standardize step description formatting in E2E runners
- Clean up assertion messages for better readability

Files updated:
- src/pages/logs.rs - assertion message formatting
- src/test_support.rs - E2E runner step descriptions, is_empty checks
- tests/export_tests.rs - format string cleanup
- tests/mouse_e2e.rs - inline format args
- tests/println_gating_tests.rs - assertion formatting
- tests/pty_harness.rs - comprehensive format string updates
- tests/shell_out_e2e.rs - step description formatting

All 144 tests continue to pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
